race.description: Mekka Raceday On Sale Now Plate (C6)
race.comment: BOSSED UP (5) raced handy and looked the winner only to be denied by the judge in a BM85 over 1200m at Eagle Farm last time out. Cherry ripe after three runs back and while he lacks the quality of the top pick he is sure to be competitive. PRE EMINENCE (3) backs up seven days after a welcomed return to form at the Sunshine Coast where he closed off in great style over 1000m. Placed at both runs here over today's journey. Definite contender. Speedy mare MOULIN MISS (9) last raced when a close fourth over 1000m at the Gold Coast seven weeks ago. Unbeaten in two runs here over 1110m. Sure to give them something to catch. SURPRISE HONEY (10) has been thereabouts of late and should go in all trifectas and first fours.
